tldr: Sam Welsford took a reduced bunch sprint on the new Nairne finish ahead of Lund Andresen and Lewis Bower. A late-stage crash inside the closing 3 km had no GC consequence — same-time rule.

narrative.headline: Welsford wins, Vine defends
narrative.body: 140.8 km from Henley Beach via Wickham Hill and the McLaren Flat / Kuitpo loops, finishing in Nairne. The bunch came back together for a reduced sprint after the late breakaway was caught; Welsford took INEOS's third stage podium of the week.

gcImpact.headline: GC unchanged
gcImpact.body: Late-stage crash inside the closing 3 km, same-time rule applied. Vine kept the jersey unchanged.

crashes.description: Late-stage crash inside the closing 3 km; bunch finish unaffected per 3 km rule.
